title: Safe Refactor Planner
purpose: Generate safe, reversible and testable refactor plans without modifying code.
commands: python -m devpilot_core refactor-plan --target src/devpilot_core/review --goal "Extract shared helpers" --json
python -m devpilot_core refactor-plan --target src/devpilot_core/review --goal "Extract shared helpers" --json --write-report
pass_criteria: tests and rollback guidance are included.
PolicyEngine and SecretGuard are enforced before analysis.
block_criteria: Denied path or secret-like refactor goal.
Python syntax error in analyzed file.
Any attempt to apply patches or modify files.
risks: Does not generate or apply patches.
Requires human review before any future execution flow.
next_sprint: FUNC-SPRINT-17 — ModelAdapter híbrido, proveedores y CostGuard
